title: React Dashboard skeleton
objective: Create the initial React dashboard app skeleton for visualizing project state, runs, artifacts, and policies without requiring backend services.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Create apps/dashboard or equivalent frontend workspace with a minimal React/Vite structure or dependency-free static fallback if package installation is intentionally deferred.
Add dashboard routes or views for Project State, Runs, Artifacts, Policies, and Settings placeholders.
Add a local fixture loader that can read sample run-result.json, manifest.lock, state.yml, and task-packet.json from examples or fixtures.
Document how to run or preview the dashboard in README/docs without breaking the no-network smoke test path.
Smoke test still passes after dashboard skeleton is added.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: project state, runs, artifacts, policies를 볼 수 있는 React 대시보드 뼈대를 만든다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
